ab: Malu ku ppsiling kari sunan hu?
ch: A:我可以訪問你嗎?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: Malu, smruwa ku balay.
ch: B:可以，我很願意。
en: B: Yes, I would love to.

ab: Malu ku ppsiling kari sunan hu?
ch: A:我可以訪問你嗎?
en: A:Can I interview you?

ab: Uxay ku, ini ttuku ka knkla mu.
ch: B:不要，我所知道的不多。
en: B:Don't, I don't know much about it.

ab: Niqan su diyax ka babaw cka hidaw hu? Knmusa ku qmita sunan, ya malu hu?
ch: A:你下午有空嗎?我想去拜訪你，可以嗎?
en: A: Are you free this afternoon? I'd like to visit you, is that OK?

ab: Iyaq, twaun misu sapah mu.
ch: B:好，我會在家等你。
en: B: Okay, I'll wait for you at home.

ab: Niqan diyax su ka kusun hu? Iyux ku mpsiling sunan quri pnngalan kari pnsltudan Sediq Balay.
ch: A:你明天有空嗎?我想請問你關於賽德克族的傳說故事。
en: A: Are you free tomorrow? I'd like to ask you about the saga of the Sedecks.

ab: Musa ku lmiqu ka kusun, uka ku mniq sapah wah.
ch: B:明天我要去山上，我不在家喔。
en: B: I'm going to the mountains tomorrow, I'm not home.

ab: Mbahang ku isu pa niqan balay knklanan su quri waya Sediq Balay, knpsiling ku sunan.
ch: A:我聽說您對賽德克族的傳統習俗非常了解，想要請教您一下。
en: A: I've heard that you're very knowledgeable about the traditional customs of the Sedykes and would like to ask you a few questions.

ab: Ini ttuku ka knkla mu, binaw qquwi ku cmiyuk kari.
ch: B:我所了解的不多，但是我會盡量回答。
en: B: I don't know much about it, but I will try to answer as best I can.

ab: Ya ku malu psueyga hu? So ni u kiya ka slxan hari sbatas ka ndan ta.
ch: A:請問我可以錄影嗎?這樣以後比較容易記錄。
en: A: Can I record the video? It will be easier to record in the future.

ab: Iyaq, malu hmi.
ch: B:好的，沒問題。
en: B: Okay, no problem.

ab: Khnu su kngkawas ka kawas saya da?
ch: A:請問您今年幾歲了?
en: A: How old are you?

ab: Wada ku mngari kmxalan mspac ka kngkawas mu da.
ch: B:我已經98歲了。
en: B: I'm 98 years old.

ab: Risaw su balay.
ch: A:您真年輕。
en: A: You're so young.

ab: Uxay wah! Rudan ku bay da.
ch: B:沒有啦! 我已經很老了。
en: B: No! I'm already very old.

ab: Kndadax inu ka alang su isu?
ch: A:請問您來自哪裡?
en: A: Where are you from?

ab: Kndadax ku alang Toda ka yaku.
ch: B:我來自alang Toda都達部落。
en: B: I'm from the alang Toda tribe.

ab: Sediq Balay uri ka qridin su hu?
ch: A:請問您的太太也是賽德克族人嗎?
en: A: Is your wife also a Sedek?

ab: Uxay, Bunun ka hiya.
ch: B:不，她是布農族人。
en: B: No, she's a Bunun.

ab: Mkla su rmngaw khnu kluwan kari?
ch: A:您會說哪些語言?
en: A: What languages do you speak?

ab: Mkla ku rmngaw kari Sediq Toda mi kari Sjiq Tuda mi kari Sejiq/Seejiq Truku mi kari Seediq Tgdaya ka yaku.
ch: 我會說賽德克族都達語、賽德克族督達語、賽德克族德鹿谷語和賽德克族德固達雅語。
en: B: I will speak the Seddiac Dutta and the Seddiac Telugu and the Seddiac Telugu Daya.

ab: Mqaras ku balay malu psiling kari sunan ka diyax saya, brahaw su balay owda snrnu quri pndakar waya umaduk haw?
ch: A:今天很高興能訪問您，請您談一下，有關狩獵的禁忌好嗎?
en: A: It's a pleasure to interview you today, can you talk about the taboo of hunting?

ab: Iyaq. Risaw ku cida pa knttu ku balay musa lmiqu umaduk kddiyax ka yaku.
ch: B:好的。我年輕的時候很常上山打獵。
en: B: Yes. I used to go hunting in the mountains when I was young.

ab: Mhuway su balay, laway bay knmalu ka tnsanan su yaku diyax saya.
ch: A:謝謝，您今天所教導的真是太棒了。
en: A: Thank you, what you taught me today was really great.

ab: Balay bay balay kana ka rnengaw mu kari, snrnuwan lnutuc hniti kari rudan ta cbiyaw.
ch: B:我所説的都是千真萬確的，祖先所流傳的講述。
en: B: All that I say is true, the sayings of my ancestors.

ab: Muda hini ka psiling kari ta saya. Mhuway su balay snrnuwan su kari.
ch: A:今天的訪談就到這邊。非常謝謝您的分享。
en: A: That's all for today's interview. Thank you very much for sharing with us.

ab: Ini huya, pprngaw ta babaw dungan.
ch: B:不客氣，我們再聊。
en: B: You're welcome, let's talk again.

ab: Musa ku da, so mpqbahang ou bay kluwanan snrnuwan kari ka nduray dungan.
ch: A:我要離開了，期待下次聽到更多的故事。
en: A: I'm going to leave now and look forward to hearing more stories next time.

ab: Iyaq wah! Thuway musa.
ch: B:好喔!請慢走。
en: B: Okay! Please take care.
